google_trends.production_note: Google Trends API alpha exists, but V1 treats live collection as pending. pytrends is best-effort only.

youtube.production_note: Cache aggressively. YouTube search.list quota cost is high.

reddit_forum.production_note: Collect text and metadata only; pass text events downstream to customer sentiment.

app_store.production_note: Official app pages are preferred; Sensor Tower/data.ai can be added if licensed.

ecommerce_product_basket.production_note: Basket must remain stable over time to produce comparable product-level value metrics.
